---
title: Inazuma Eleven API
abstract: An Inazuma Eleven API based on a Kaggle dataset
categories: Personal project
image: "/imgs/inazuma_logo.jpg"
author: 
    - name: Naïm Saadi Gallego
      url: https://linkedin.com/in/nsaadig16
---

<img src="/imgs/inazuma_img.svg" width=600 align=center class="imgs">

<p></p>

## Description

This *Inazuma Eleven* API serves endpoints to retrieve information about all the characters in the first game.

It takes the information from [this Kaggle dataset](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/daviddelaiglesia/inazuma-eleven-1-dataset), and uses `pandas` to access the information. The API is currently deployed on Render [here](https://inazumaelevenapi.onrender.com/docs). 

Check the repo [here](https://github.com/nsaadig16/InazumaElevenAPI)! 
 
## Development process

<p align="justify">
This project started as a personal challenge when some classmates realized there weren't any decent Inazuma Eleven API where they could get the data for a class project, just plain datasets. I decided to make the API using **FastAPI**, use `pandas` for the data management and deployed it on Render for everyone to use.
</p>

## Technologies used

![Python](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon@latest/icons/python/python-original-wordmark.svg){width=60}
![Docker](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon@latest/icons/docker/docker-plain-wordmark.svg){width=60}
![FastAPI](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon@latest/icons/fastapi/fastapi-original.svg){width=60}
![pandas](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon@latest/icons/pandas/pandas-original.svg){width=60}
![json](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon@latest/icons/json/json-original.svg){width=60}
